<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <!-- Branch -->
  <path d="M40 180 C120 120, 220 90, 320 120 C390 140, 440 175, 485 220" fill="none" stroke="#7A4A1E" stroke-width="22" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M55 190 C130 135, 225 110, 320 135 C385 155, 435 185, 470 225" fill="none" stroke="#5C3414" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.9"/>

  <!-- Sloth body -->
  <ellipse cx="320" cy="290" rx="80" ry="95" fill="#8B6B4F"/>
  <ellipse cx="320" cy="280" rx="92" ry="110" fill="none" stroke="#6F543B" stroke-width="8" opacity="0.7"/>

  <!-- Head -->
  <circle cx="340" cy="205" r="42" fill="#8B6B4F"/>
  <circle cx="340" cy="205" r="46" fill="none" stroke="#6F543B" stroke-width="7" opacity="0.75"/>

  <!-- Muzzle/Face patch -->
  <path d="M318 226 C330 240, 355 240, 368 225 C372 195, 357 182, 343 182 C328 182, 313 195, 318 226 Z" fill="#A68463" opacity="0.95"/>

  <!-- Eyes (no text) -->
  <circle cx="332" cy="205" r="6" fill="#2B1F18"/>
  <circle cx="352" cy="205" r="6" fill="#2B1F18"/>
  <path d="M334 219 C342 224, 349 224, 356 219" fill="none" stroke="#2B1F18" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <!-- Arms grabbing branch -->
  <path d="M260 250 C235 235, 215 220, 205 200" fill="none" stroke="#8B6B4F" stroke-width="22" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M205 200 C196 182, 210 165, 228 168" fill="none" stroke="#8B6B4F" stroke-width="22" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <!-- Paw detail -->
  <path d="M214 171 C205 170, 195 180, 200 192 C208 199, 224 198, 230 189" fill="#6F543B" opacity="0.55"/>

  <!-- Legs -->
  <path d="M280 360 C280 405, 270 425, 250 450" fill="none" stroke="#8B6B4F" stroke-width="22" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M358 360 C360 405, 375 430, 405 455" fill="none" stroke="#8B6B4F" stroke-width="22" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <!-- Feet/paws -->
  <path d="M242 452 C245 438, 258 432, 270 437 C282 441, 282 456, 272 463 C259 470, 244 463, 242 452 Z" fill="#6F543B" opacity="0.6"/>
  <path d="M404 456 C403 441, 416 432, 429 436 C442 440, 444 456, 432 466 C419 475, 406 468, 404 456 Z" fill="#6F543B" opacity="0.6"/>

  <!-- Shadow under sloth -->
  <ellipse cx="320" cy="430" rx="120" ry="26" fill="#000000" opacity="0.08"/>

  <!-- Background hints (soft sky) -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="512" height="512" fill="#F3F1EE"/>
  <path d="M0 360 C70 330, 130 345, 200 360 C275 376, 350 370, 512 335 L512 512 L0 512 Z" fill="#E6E1DB" opacity="0.75"/>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

Everything should be in a 512x512 format. I’ll make sure to return a JSON with the SVG string!

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }
